overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) depicting a character running through a rainy night in a 1960s American suburban and commercial district. The character navigates wet streets, crosses intersections with vintage traffic, and passes period-appropriate vehicles and pedestrians under the glow of street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with two-story corner house

events.description: character crosses the crosswalk and steps onto the sidewalk
character turns left to follow the sidewalk alongside the corner house

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the wet crosswalk and turning onto the sidewalk, running alongside the illuminated corner house

notable_agents.action: distant figure visible walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: two-story house with pink upper facade and stone lower level, warm light glowing from windows
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet reflective asphalt
tall curved street lamp illuminating the rainy intersection with orange light
octagonal stop sign mounted on pole at the street corner
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the corner house

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a rainy residential intersection, crossing the wet crosswalk in front of a distinctive two-story pink house. After crossing, the character turns left onto the sidewalk, running alongside the house with its illuminated windows while street lamps cast reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with single-family bungalows and parked cars

events.description: two pedestrians walking toward the camera briefly occupy the center of the frame
character runs past a parked blue vintage muscle car on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the grassy verge beside the sidewalk, passing residential homes and navigating around oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk, passing by on the left
blue vintage two-door muscle car parked on the roadside with chrome details

entered.detail: single-story wooden home with front porch and white painted trim
white wooden fence running along the property line of the bungalow
vintage blue two-door muscle car with white racing stripes parked on the street
white mailbox mounted on wooden post near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the residential street, passing single-story bungalows with white picket fences on the left. Two pedestrians approach from the opposite direction on the sidewalk, and the character passes a vintage blue muscle car parked on the right side of the wet road, with more residential homes stretching into the rainy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy four-way intersection with traffic signals and multiple vehicle lanes

events.description: character waits at the intersection corner as cars pass through the green light
traffic light changes and character begins crossing the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the busy intersection, waiting for a gap in traffic, then sprinting across the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: white van and green vintage sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
person holding an umbrella waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with red and green lights illuminated
broad white-striped pedestrian crossing spanning the wide four-way intersection
line of vintage 1960s cars parked along the commercial street
low-rise commercial structures with illuminated signs visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy four-way intersection with overhead traffic lights and multiple vintage vehicles moving through. After waiting for cars to pass, the character crosses the wide intersection, transitioning from the residential neighborhood into a more commercial district with parked cars lining the streets and storefronts visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with gas station, bus stop, and pedestrian activity

events.description: character completes crossing and steps onto the commercial sidewalk with more pedestrian activity
character slows slightly to navigate around pedestrians on the crowded sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the commercial sidewalk, weaving between pedestrians carrying umbrellas and heading toward the distant clock tower

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking ahead on the wet sidewalk
group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking toward the camera on the right side

entered.detail: service station with illuminated red and white canopy visible down the side street
tall stone tower with clock face rising above the commercial buildings
row of shops with awnings and illuminated windows facing the street
covered bus stop shelter with bench visible on the far left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character enters a commercial area with increased pedestrian activity. The character runs along the wet sidewalk past a gas station and various storefronts, navigating around pedestrians carrying umbrellas, with a distinctive clock tower visible in the rainy distance ahead and the glow of city lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy 1960s neighborhood that gradually transitions from a quiet residential street into a bustling commercial district. It begins at a wet intersection in front of a two-story pink house, following the character as they turn onto a sidewalk where street lamps cast reflections on the rain-soaked pavement. As the character continues running, the scene shifts past single-story bungalows with white picket fences and a parked vintage blue muscle car before approaching a busy four-way intersection filled with period vehicles. The camera then follows the character across this wide crossing, leaving the residential homes behind as the environment opens up into a commercial area. Finally, the shot moves past a gas station and various storefronts, navigating through pedestrians with umbrellas toward a distant clock tower under the glow of city lights.
